case_title: JOANNA THEIL VS. SANJIV PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY THEIL, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, SANJIV DOES 1 TO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPERANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
